title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - **Login clarity failure:** users hit `auth-stale` and cannot tell whether to use Cloudflare Access vs password (or which path is active), then bounce between `/happy/` and `/happy/auth/`; **impact:** recovery from expired auth stalls and mobile control is effectively down; **detect with:** a UI contract that forces explicit mode labeling + primary CTA source on both status strip and gateway, plus an end-to-end `auth-stale -> reauth -> back to same task` flow test. - **Multi-task visibility failure:** with many concurrent tasks, blocked/high-risk work is buried behind default filter/state summaries and users optimize the wrong task; **impact:** missed human gates and delayed interventions; **detect with:** behavior tests that seed large mixed task sets and assert that `needs-human/needs-review` items stay visible/prioritized in Work and nav counters. - **Per-task NL control failure:** follow-up instructions are only global (Home composer), so operators send commands without task binding/context; **impact:** commands attach to wrong task thread, causing state divergence and accidental actions; **detect with:** contract requiring task-sheet scoped compose UI and packet schema fields like `parent_task_id/task_id`, validated by task-detail interaction tests. - **Communication visibility failure:** outbound communications (issue comments, escalations, approvals requested) are not surfaced as a first-class task timeline signal; **impact:** operators cannot verify whether Kernel actually notified humans/systems; **detect with:** event/UI contract that requires per-task communication events and acknowledgement status in task sheet/live timeline. - **Cost visibility failure:** no mobile surfacing of spend/token burn/budget thresholds; **impact:** runaway model/API cost is discovered too late, often after degraded service; **detect with:** state schema + UI contract for `cost summary / budget alert / per-task usage`, and failure tests that assert warning/escalation when thresholds are crossed.
